title: Hawser (Edge)
description: Dockhand Edge agent — outbound WebSocket, no inbound ports needed
note: Deploys Hawser in Edge mode: initiates an outbound WebSocket connection to the central Dockhand server. No inbound ports required — works behind NAT and firewalls. Set DOCKHAND_SERVER_URL and TOKEN from the Dockhand UI when adding a new Edge environment.
